title: POOLPURE Hot Tub Spa Filters Replacement for Unicel C-4326, with Medicine Box Filbur FC-2375, SC704, 42513, 8512, RD26, Pleatco PRB25IN(Invoice Available)
features: 🥇【Safety Material】Poolpure hot tub filters is tested and certified by IAPMO against NSF/ANSI 50 for safe and eco-friendly material.
❄️【Replacement Models】Hot tub filters Pleatco PRB25-IN / Unicel C-4326 / Filbur FC-2375 / 17-2327 / 100586 / 33521 / 25392 / 303909 / M-4326 / 8172500 / R173429.
❄️【Product Detail】4OZ media. Filtration Area: 25 Sq. feet；Length: 13 5/16”(33.8cm); Outside Diameter: 5”(12.5cm); Top Hole: 2 1/8”(5.4cm) Open; Bottom Hole: 2 1/8”(5.4cm) Open.

❄️【Strong and Durable】 The jacuzzi filter includes the break-resistant end cap, big-flow ABS inner core, widened band and thick filtration fabric to form a strong and durable body. The filter can resist high pressure and the corrosion of high-capacity chlorine.

❄️【Powerful Filtration Performance】Innovated “Dirt-Locking” technology spa filters for hot tubs make the fabric contain much more contaminants than common fabric. The filter can high efficiently reduce hair, leaves, dust, sediment, sand. Enjoy leisure time in your spa and hot tub.
description: Certified To Nsf Ansi 50 This Pool Spa Filter Is Certified By Iapmo Against Nsf Ansi 50 For Safe Material. Compatible Pool Spa Models: Sundance Spas Coast Spas Rainbow Waterway Plastics Dynasty Spas Sunset Spas Islander Spas Honey Tubs Aqua Mystic Bullfrog Spas Southwest Spas Spa Crest Spas Direct Rubadub Tub Apollo Spas Maax Spas Of Az Us Spas Beachcomber Alps Spas Tiara Spas Discovery Spas Pageant Spas Icon Spas Morgan Spas Jem Spas Coast Mountain Spas Gatsby Spas Columbia Spas Arcadia Spas Blue Pacific Spas Freedom Spas And More Types. Replacement Filter Models: Pleatco Prb25 In Unicel C 4326 Filbur Fc 2375 17 2327 100586 33521 25392 303909 M 4326 8172500 R173429 Package Include: Cartridge Filter X 1 All Of Our Products Are Assembled In Usa, By Amazon.
